name: promote
description: End-to-end product promotion strategy with two-pass orchestration (operator consultation + production). Give /promote-strategist a URL: it asks about the product, proposes channels actively (beyond what you mentioned), invokes 19 world-class operator skills in strategic-consultation mode, produces 14 days of concrete content + 76 days of outlines. Use /promote-content-batcher to convert outlines to concrete posts on demand.

promote_home.title: Campaigns directory
promote_home.description: Where promote artifacts (campaigns) are written. Resolution order: 1) $PROMOTE_HOME env var, 2) ./campaigns/ relative to cwd (default), 3) ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/campaigns/ fallback if cwd is not writable.
